title: Nami’s Scheme in Orange Town
description: On pages 1–4, this part begins the Orange Town storyline, where Nami’s schemes and Buggy’s crew pull Luffy and Zoro into a new conflict.
scene: Luffy and Zoro drift at sea after leaving Shells Town, exposing how unprepared they are without a navigator.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DON'T YOU THINK IT'S STRANGE THAT YOU CAN'T NAVIGATE?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No, drifting has worked pretty well for me.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHAT ABOUT YOU? YOU'RE SUPPOSED TO BE THE HOLYTEROR OF THE SEAS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DON'T RECALL EVER CALLING MYSEELF THAT.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I followed a pirate I was after out to sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But I couldn't find my way back to my village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So I made the best of things. I went after pirates that were in the area.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I HAD TO EARN MONEY SOMEHOW...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: YOU DON'T HAVE TO PUT IT LIKE THAT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Anyway, what kind of a pirate doesn't know how to navigate a ship? It's ridiculous!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: At this rate, we'll NEVER MAKE IT to the GRAND LINE.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WE'VE GOT TO RECRUT A NAVIGATORAS SOON AS POSSIBLE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AND WE NEED A COOK, AND A MUSICIAN, AND--

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: LEAVE IT TO ME! I'LL CATCH IT!!

summary: This opening beat shows the new crew’s biggest practical problem: Luffy has ambition but no navigation skills, while Zoro is stranded with him. Their hunger and reckless attempt to catch a bird push them toward Orange Town.
